intent: 2BR / 1 bath, mid-band hall, LDK smoke test, no carport. 12x10 lot gives an 8x6 envelope = 48 m2 floor -- the published minimum for this topology (its living/dining/kitchen stack needs buildable depth >= 6 m; shallower lots route to the gr sibling). Single common bath at the rear next to kitchen; a hallway is tucked into the middle band -- both bedrooms and the common bath door onto the hall, never directly onto the public side. Public side is a real living/dining/kitchen split stacked front-to-rear -- the hall's open mouth connects to dining (the middle-row public room), not living.
must_haves: common bath accessible from the hall
mid-band hallway serving both bedrooms and the common bath
separate living, dining, and kitchen rooms stacked front-to-rear
